subcodes.first_line: A mention from Us unto the leaf that hath spoken upon the Tree of Knowledge even as the Dove hath spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الورقه التی نطقت علی سدره العرفان بما نطقت الورقاء علی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
